issue.title: Chore: tidy contributor setup wording
issue.body:
## Problem

Some contributor setup wording could be clearer.

## Requested Change

Make one small documentation-only wording improvement in the setup or contributing docs.

## Constraints

- Documentation only
- No application code changes
- Keep it minimal

issue.title: Chore: document secret handling guidance for local setup
issue.body:
## Problem

Local setup documentation should make it clear that secrets and access tokens must not be committed to the repository.

## Requested Change

Add one small documentation-only note reminding contributors to keep local secrets, API keys, tokens, and `.env` files out of source control.

## Constraints

- Documentation only
- No application code changes
- No dependency upgrades
- Keep it minimal

issue.title: Chore: add note about avoiding committed secrets
issue.body:
## Problem

The project documentation should remind contributors not to commit secrets.

## Requested Change

Add one small documentation-only note about avoiding committed secrets such as API keys, tokens, passwords, and local `.env` files.

## Constraints

- Documentation only
- No application code changes
- No dependency changes
- Keep it minimal

issue.title: Chore: document safe handling of local configuration files
issue.body:
## Problem

Contributors should be reminded to keep local configuration files out of source control.

## Requested Change

Add one small documentation-only note about not committing local config files, secrets, tokens, or environment-specific settings.

## Constraints

- Documentation only
- No application code changes
- No dependency changes
- Keep it minimal
